title: Terms of Service
acceptanceOfTermsBody: By using Encounter, you agree to these terms. This app is designed for personal, private use between consenting individuals.
eligibilityBody: You must be at least 18 years old to use this service due to the sensitive and intimate nature of the content recorded.
userResponsibilityBody: You are solely responsible for the content you log. Encounter is a "passive tool"; we do not monitor or verify the accuracy of your records. You are responsible for keeping your device and PIN/Password secure.
dataOwnershipBody: You own 100% of your data. You may export or delete your records at any time. If you delete your account, all cloud-synced data will be purged from our Supabase instance.
disclaimerOfLiabilityBody: Encounter is provided "as is". We are not liable for any emotional distress, relationship outcomes, or data loss resulting from the use of the application.
contactQuestion: Questions about these terms? Contact us at
